title: grastidium extra-axillare
intro: Grastidium extra-axillare, also known as the extra-axillary burr, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grastidium extra-axillare include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and even help to manage certain types of infections. Grastidium extra-axillare can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
